title: Hackathon Registration
excerpt: Hi, I just found out about the monday.com hackathon and would like to participate. It said that the registration period was in Sept., but can I still register and participate?

posts.author: ashleyc (Ashley)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I just found out about the monday.com hackathon and would like to participate. It said that the registration period was in Sept., but can I still register and participate?

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ashleyc - welcome to the community!

It’s a new page to register than the last one I believe, but this link should work.

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
